final_message:
Both files are written and verified:

- `REPORT.md` — 129 words; exactly the four required `##` headings in order; Overview states `$7,154.44` total revenue and 30 orders; Recommendations has exactly 3 bullets (14, 18, 15 words each), all data-grounded; none of the banned words appear.
- `summary.json` — exactly five keys, computed from the CSV:
  - `total_revenue`: 7154.44, `orders`: 30, `median_order_value`: 204.94
  - `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00)
  - `revenue_by_region`: North 2176.35, South 1732.48, East 1830.79, West 1414.82

No commits made; all work stayed in the current directory.
